metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins by Pyro — research, prototyping, publishing, creative lifecycle, and persistent agent memory.

plugins.name: limitless
plugins.description: Pyro's curated skill pack: article-pack, Codies Research, Surface-First Development, SearXNG, Suno Pack (authoring, rendering, experiment lanes, saga-synced journals), Hivemind (collective-brain search: social + GitHub + web + papers, pivot chains, saved sweep configs), Dojo (verified skill authoring), and James (persistent constrained review with recipes and review chains for self-contained planning docs).

plugins.name: after-hours
plugins.description: A calm, high-taste skill pack for project identity, subtraction, naming, coherence, and first-contact honesty.

plugins.name: pyro-kit
plugins.description: 17-skill creative lifecycle toolkit: idea excavation, design exploration, prototyping, contracts, building, momentum tracking, and anti-abandonment composting.

plugins.name: codies-memory
plugins.description: Persistent agent memory with agent-namespaced vaults, promotion pipelines, trust levels, CLI write commands, and explicit _general read mode for vault-less notes. Requires uv sync setup.
